case_title: JASMINE BEAUCHAMP VS. VINCENT TINCHUNG TAI et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GREGORY J. BULLIUNG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-28-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR #3058. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-09-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-28-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2002 CONTINUED TO DEC-09-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEAUCHAMP, JASMINE AS TO DEFENDANT TAI, VINCENT TINCHUNG DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-15-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-13-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
